abstract:
The issue consists the following items:

1. Exciting options for people-centered development were brainstormed at an International Symposium on Semi-Arid Tropical Futures.
2. International Centers team up to help war-torn East Timor rehabilitate its agriculture.
3. Scientists participating in a training workshop on spatial variability in watersheds learned how farmers can turn land variability to their advantage.
4. Scientists are on the verge of achieving the world's first cytoplasmic male-sterile hybrid pigeonpea
5. Groundnut variety CG 7: a boost to Malawian agriculture
6. ICRISAT celebrates the Power of Partnership in India-ICRISAT Day.
7. National researchers persevere despite funding constraints to deliver impact in El Salvador
8. ICRISAT and World Vision International join hands to deliver improved technologies to needy communities in Southern Africa.
title: SATrends Issue 1
